chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.S-62 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 3392/25 3.For hearing of main case 13-11-2025 None present for the appellant. **** None present for the appellant; no intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing, none was in attendance on behalf of the appellant, which shows that the appellant and his counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Result thereof, instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal along with listed application(s) is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
